title: The Guards Try to Stop Them
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the guards try to stop them.
scene: The scene focuses on the guards try to stop them, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: At this rate, they're going to escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Forget the kids!! Just take 'em down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: They are not running any more in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...but it seems they are mighty pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That kindness of yours is beautiful, nami-san!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm falling for you all over again!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We'll take care of these punks!!!

summary: The Guards Try to Stop Them. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
